name: pnw-clinical-bodywork-site
description: Public marketing website for PNW Clinical Bodywork (healingworkscenter.com)

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name pnw-clinical-bodywork
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name pnw-clinical-bodywork --branch preview
